title: Closed my BTC short for +1,040 points
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Closed the BTC short trade today at  **28-04-2026 UTC close** at **76,390**, after entering at **77,430** on the **25-04-2026 UTC open**.

That makes it roughly **+1,040 points** on the trade.

What I liked about this one is that it was a good example of trusting the system through noise. The position went against me at one point, but the setup stayed valid, so I let it play out instead of forcing an early exit. In the end, that patience paid off.

For me, this is one of the main strengths of the model:

* it is selective,
* it gives trades room to develop,
* and it focuses on the larger directional move rather than reacting to every short-term fluctuation.

I’ve been live trading the system since September, and trades like this are a big part of why I believe in its process. The system is designed to adapt, stay disciplined, and capture the move when the market eventually confirms it.

**6 years of backtest of my model with fixed risk exposure shows:**

* CAGR \~56%
* SHARPE >2
* Average Monthly ROI \~10%
* Max DD \~25%
